message:
feat(namespace_isolation): add multi-tenant namespace isolation module (ft-12wc0)

Implements complete namespace isolation subsystem for multi-tenant boundary
enforcement: TenantNamespace (validated hierarchical identifiers), NamespaceBinding,
CrossTenantPolicy with configurable rules, NamespaceRegistry with audit log,
and telemetry counters. Includes 38 unit tests and 19 property-based tests
(9 serde roundtrip + 10 behavioral invariants).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
